title: PortableNote Manifest
description: Vault identity, spec version, format declaration, and checksum chain.

vault_id.description: Permanent vault identity. UUID v4. Never changes.

spec_version.description: PortableNote spec version this vault conforms to. Semver.

format.description: Content format for all blocks. Always 'markdown'; the system is markdown-native.

checksum.description: SHA-256 over canonical serialization of all source artifacts. Prefixed 'sha256:'. This is the commit point: once written, the commit is complete.

previous_checksum.description: Checksum of the vault state before the most recent commit. null for the genesis commit (vault init). Together with checksum, forms a hash chain: each manifest records a verifiable (before, after) state transition. Two manifests sharing a previous_checksum but differing on checksum indicate a fork.
